validated_dependencies: Active Python interpreter selected through USBAY_PYTHON when present.
Virtual environment Python selected through VIRTUAL_ENV when USBAY_PYTHON is absent.
python3 fallback remains explicit and fails if unavailable.
Focused tests prove subprocess dependency context alignment.

commands_run.command: for f in governance/evidence/pb162/*.json; do .venv/bin/python -m json.tool "$f" >/dev/null || exit 1; done
metadata validation for generated_commit_title, generated_pr_title, generated_pr_body sections
conflict marker scan over extracted files and governance/evidence/pb162

validation_results.out_of_scope_handling: Do not stage or include these items in PB-162 extraction package.
